rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using valid syntax: assume, guarantee, eq, const, and assign statements
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation scope
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not, and implication (=>)
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Delete generated clauses if diagnostics report unresolved references to AADL properties or unit tokens
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope; do not invent declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations, e.g., 0.0 -> pre(t) + step
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not, and implication (=>)
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not invent declarations for unresolved references; use exact visible identifiers
Do not use AADL property names or unit tokens directly in AGREE expressions
